title: Bpd glisten headcanon

content:
JENNALISE'S INTERVIEW
Jennalise walks to the stage in a flowy, magical-looking dress that's half brown, half green - just like her eyes. It's tight around her upper body, but somehow it doesn't make her look like the malnourished girl she is. Her expression is stern and she looks as if she's already done with the games. 
"Here she is - Jennalise Auburn from District 1, our first tribute of the night!"
Jennalise gracefully sits down. Remembering she has to get sponsors if she wants to survive the games (or at least survive the games long enough to fuck them up in some way) she manages a small smile and tries to look as natural as possible. She fiddles with the small braids in her otherwise left down long hair, nervously waiting.
"Let's just get right into it! How do you feel about the message, the twist of this year's hunger games?"
Jenny takes a deep breath, preparing for a nice, quiet answer, but then she thinks "fuck it" and gives Persephone her answer. "You know, in 1, there's not a lot of criminals - everyone's a career, training to be in the hunger games and be another one of the Capitol's puppets. Combine that with the amount of tesserae I've taken and I basically knew I was gonna get reaped. So, in conclusion, I do not like it at all. I mean, would you? To know that the whole system is basically built to destroy you and other fairly innocent people that are just trying to live and get by?" She's basically shouting the last part.
"Alright alright Jenny, no need to get aggressive."
"Do not call me Jenny, my name is Jennalise."
Jenny did not like Perspehone, and the distaste was mutual. 
"Let's just move on to the next question then, Jennalise. If you could say anything, absolutely anything to the Capitol with absolutely no consequences, then what would it be?"
Jenny breathes in slowly to calm her anger from the previous question. She knew what she would say. She would say that if the Capitol was such a lovely place to live in, then why was her little sister dead because of a careless mayor? Why did Jenny have to fend for herself  since she was little? Why were there 23 kids dying every year, on TV, for the entertainment of the rich disguised as a punishment? But she didn't say any of that. She knew she'd already said too much and gotten too angry during the first question so she just answered: "The Capitol doesn't take good enough care of the young and defenseless kids." 
"That is quite the statement that I, I must say, do not agree with but we're starting to run out of time so I'll not dwell on that any longer. Last question then! What was the reasoning behind your decision to abandon the careers and join Asteria from District 11?" 
Finally a question that Jenny could give a (mostly) honest answer to without fearing for her life (or without fearing for not getting sponsors). "It's simple, really. I didn't feel any kind of of connection with the other tributes from the career districts. Judging by previous games, the careers often turn on each other towards the end and I'm not saying that's gonna happen in these games but that is just not something I'd like to experience. And Asteria truly seems like a really trustworthy girl to me, and we work together quite well so the choice was not that hard, really."
"Well, that was Jennalise from District 1! Let's give her an applause, everyone!"
Jennalise walked off the stage with faked confidence, praying, that her aggressive statements didn't ruin her games. Or worse, Asterias.
TRIBUTE NAME, GENDER AND DISTRICT: Jennalise "Jenny" Auburn, female, D1
BLOODBATH STRATEGY: quickly get something close to her, her first choices would be (in that order) water, a mace, some food. then run away quickly and find shelter with her ally asteria. will fight and kill someone if they are endangering her or asterias life. 
WHOLE GAME STRATEGY: find shelter, preferably close to some water and stay in hiding with her ally. when it gets "too boring" hunt down lone tributes. she'll try to wreck the arena or ruin the games in some way (but she doesn't really have a plan so she'll probably fail).
SPECIAL REQUESTS: when she's about to die or just really injured or in a very difficult situation otherwise, could she start crying and saying something like "my little angel, my poor little angel, my  dear malloroy, ive failed you, i was supposed to win these games for you..." (talking about her dead sister). and when she dies, could she die protecting asteria? again these are just requests its fine if u can't to them 
btw sorry for my backstory, interview etc being written um... interestingly my brain can not stick to one concept and thinks it has to make the oc traumatized for it to be a good oc even tho it actually makes it weir and hard to digest !
